Parent & Child Painting Class with Ohio City Art House

Date: Saturday, May 2, 2026
Time: 12:50 PM - 2:00 PM
Ages: 3+

About This Event

Ohio City Art House is coming to The Wandering Lantern for a special parent-and-child painting class! Work side by side on a guided project — no art experience necessary.

What to Expect

  • Guided painting session led by Ohio City Art House instructors
  • All supplies provided
  • A finished piece to take home together

Details

  • All ages welcome — projects are designed so everyone can participate
  • 12:50 PM - 2:00 PM
  • Reserve your spot through Eventbrite!

Secure your spot before time runs out!
